title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon, to enter into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Armed Forces of the Philippines-Task Force Ugnay, 2nd Infantry Division, Philippine Army Regarding the Renewal of the declaration of Stable Peace and Security (SIPS) in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna.
